params.name: Sorrows of Werther
params.description:
On Feb 9, 1774 AD, The Sorrows of Werther was published at the Leipzig Book Fair.
It is a medium-length novel written by the German author Goethe. The protagonist, Werther, falls in love with a girl named Charlotte, but she has already engaged to someone else, which makes Werther extremely sad. Later, Werther leaves Charlotte and returns to the city, becoming a clerk, but he is often ridiculed and despised by the nobility, feeling that he is incompatible with society.
